data.title: France's Budget Deficit Reduction Strategy Faces Uncertainty
data.description: France's efforts to decrease its budget deficit this year are facing significant uncertainty, according to the country's audit court. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenges in achieving fiscal targets amid economic pressures. The audit court's report underscores the difficulties in implementing effective measures to curb the deficit, which has been a persistent issue for the French government. The court's assessment raises concerns about the feasibility of the current strategy and suggests that more robust actions may be necessary to address the fiscal imbalance. The report comes at a time when France is grappling with broader economic challenges, including inflation and slow growth, which complicate efforts to stabilize public finances. The audit court's findings emphasize the need for careful planning and execution to ensure that deficit reduction goals are met.

data.title: OpenEden Restores DNS Control After Unauthorized Domain Hijacking
data.description: OpenEden, a platform for tokenizing real-world assets, announced on X that it has regained full control over its website domain and subdomains' DNS settings, restoring normal operations. According to ChainCatcher, OpenEden revealed that its website experienced unauthorized DNS record modifications, leading to a domain hijacking incident. Following a joint investigation with security partners and infrastructure service providers, it was confirmed that the event did not affect any smart contracts, internal systems were not breached, core applications remained intact, and reserve assets were unaffected. All reserve assets can be independently verified through Chainlink's Proof of Reserve. OpenEden plans to enhance security measures for its domain and infrastructure.

data.title: Swiss National Bank Develops Standardized Process for ELF Project
data.description: The Swiss National Bank (SNB) has announced the establishment of a standardized and scalable process for the 'ELF' project. According to Jin10, this initiative will enable participating banks to swiftly access liquidity support backed by collateral when necessary. The move is aimed at enhancing the financial stability and operational efficiency of banks involved in the project. The SNB's approach underscores its commitment to providing robust financial infrastructure and support mechanisms in times of need.

data.title: Pershing Square Capital Shifts Focus to Tech Stocks with Meta Investment
data.description: Billionaire investor Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management made a significant investment in Meta Platforms, acquiring $1.76 billion worth of shares in the fourth quarter of 2025. According to NS3.AI, this move coincided with the firm's complete exit from its stake in Chipotle Mexican Grill. Additionally, Pershing Square reduced its holdings in Alphabet, Uber, and Restaurant Brands International during the same period. These strategic adjustments indicate a shift in the firm's portfolio towards tech stocks, particularly Meta and Alphabet, despite the mixed performance trends in the sector.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Potential Bear Market Amid Structural Stress
data.description: Bitcoin is confronting the possibility of entering a bear market, as indicated by key on-chain metrics that reveal structural stress and weakening capital rotation. According to NS3.AI, despite Bitcoin's price maintaining support near $66,550, there are signs of deteriorating market conditions. These include declining network activity and low realized profit/loss ratios. To prevent further declines, Bitcoin needs to decisively surpass critical resistance levels, such as $71,693 and the 20-day EMA.

data.title: OpenEden: Domain name resolution control has been restored and no assets have been damaged.
data.description: OpenEden announced on the X platform that DNS control has been fully restored, and openeden.com and its subdomains are back to normal operation. On February 16, openeden.com suffered a DNS-level intrusion due to unauthorized modification of DNS records. OpenEden, in collaboration with security partners and infrastructure providers, investigated and confirmed that smart contracts were not compromised, internal systems were not compromised, core applications remained intact, and reserve assets were unaffected. All reserve assets can be independently verified via Chainlink reserve proofs. The incident was discovered and resolved within 24 hours, and additional security measures have been implemented to strengthen domain and infrastructure protection.

data.title: Robinhood’s Layer 2 testnet sees four million transactions in first week, CEO Vlad Tenev says
data.description:
Robinhood Chain is an Ethereum Layer 2 built on Arbitrum designed to support tokenized real-world assets and onchain financial services.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/390440/robinhood-l2-testnet-four-million?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Schroders Invests in UK Government Bonds Amid Interest Rate Speculation
data.description: Schroders is increasing its investment in UK government bonds, focusing on longer-dated debt. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this move is based on the expectation that potential interest rate cuts by the Bank of England could lead to a rally in gilts. The investment strategy reflects a broader anticipation of changes in monetary policy that could impact bond markets.

data.title: Robinhood CEO: Its L2 testnet saw 4 million transactions in its first week.
data.description: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev stated that Robinhood Chain, an Ethereum L2 network based on Arbitrum, recorded 4 million transactions in its first week of public beta testing. Developers have begun building applications on the network, which aims to support the tokenization of Real-World Assets (RWAs) and on-chain financial services. Robinhood Chain launched its public beta last week after six months of private testing, positioning itself as a permissionless blockchain platform supporting high-throughput financial applications and tokenized assets such as stocks and ETFs. The network has already integrated partners such as Alchemy, LayerZero, and Chainlink. Despite a decline in crypto trading revenue on platforms like Binance to $221 million in the fourth quarter of last year, Robinhood plans to achieve 24/7 trading and near-real-time settlement through this chain. Its mainnet is expected to launch later this year.

data.title: Binance Alpha airdrop will be available starting at 18:00 today.
data.description: The Binance Alpha airdrop will open for collection today at 18:00. This event uses the Binance Alpha Box model, with an airdrop pool containing tokens from multiple projects. Users with at least 242 Binance Alpha Points can claim a token reward on a first-come, first-served basis. If the rewards are not distributed, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Users should follow the official Binance Wallet channels for specific token information and updates.

data.title: BVNK Secures CASP Licence from Malta for EEA Expansion
data.description: BVNK has successfully obtained a Crypto Asset Service Provider (CASP) licence from Malta's Malta Financial Services Authority (MFSA) under the MiCA regulatory framework. According to NS3.AI, this licence allows BVNK to offer digital asset services across all European Economic Area (EEA) countries from its base in Malta. The regulatory approval represents a crucial milestone for BVNK's growth in the European crypto market.

data.title: Fluent's Blended Execution Enhances Blockchain Interoperability
data.description: Fluent, a zk-rollup Layer 2 project, is advancing blockchain composability by allowing different virtual machines (VMs) from various chains to function together on a single chain. According to NS3.AI, this method, known as 'Blended Execution,' seeks to address interoperability issues between ecosystems like Ethereum and Solana, which utilize different VMs. Fluent is also dedicated to developing practical on-chain user environments, backed by initiatives such as a reputation aggregator and an ecosystem accelerator.

data.title: 3.909 million ETHFI were transferred out of the Anchorage Digital custody wallet, worth approximately $1.85 million.
data.description: According to Onchainschool's monitoring, about four hours ago, 3.909 million ETHFI tokens were transferred from the Anchorage Digital custodian wallet to another address, worth approximately $1.85 million. Historical transaction records show that this address deposits ETHFI tokens into Binance every month, but as of now, the 3.909 million ETHFI tokens in this transfer have not yet been transferred.

data.title: Bitcoin Holders Shift to Accumulation Amid Stagnant Price Movement
data.description: Long-term Bitcoin holders have transitioned from consistent selling near price peaks to accumulation since early January. According to NS3.AI, this shift in behavior has not yet resulted in significant upward price momentum. Historical trends indicate that such periods of stagnation often precede high volatility in the market.

data.title: STOCKS | Atlassian Co-Founder Faces Challenges Amid Global Stock Decline
data.description: Michael Cannon-Brookes, who gained billionaire status following Atlassian's initial public offering, is now experiencing the impact of a worldwide downturn in stock markets. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenges faced by Cannon-Brookes as the global stock market experiences significant volatility. The decline in stock values has affected many investors, including prominent figures like Cannon-Brookes, who have seen their fortunes fluctuate with market trends. As the co-founder of Atlassian, a leading software company, Cannon-Brookes' financial standing is closely tied to the performance of the stock market. The current market conditions underscore the unpredictable nature of stock investments and the potential risks involved for even the most successful entrepreneurs.
